calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-23-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR. JoAnn Bryce.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff Community Housing Partnership also present by Operation Manager, Harold Dees.
Defendant, Colleen Lopez present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by written stipulation (see scanned document), read into the record.
All parties agreed to and signed the settlement in open court.
Stipulation for judgment filed.
The Court deemed the matter settled, trial date is vacated.
